text:
A county is eligible to create a district as provided by this chapter only if a rail line is located in the county that:

(1) is being or has been abandoned through a bankruptcy court or Surface Transportation Board proceeding; or

(2) carries three million gross tons per mile per year or less.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 5
### Chapter 172. Rural Rail Transp. Districts
##### § 172.051 — Applicability

A county is eligible to create a district as provided by this chapter only if a rail line is located in the county that:

    (1) is being or has been abandoned through a bankruptcy court or Surface Transportation Board proceeding; or

    (2) carries three million gross tons per mile per year or less.

*Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 85 (S.B.1540), Sec. 2.04, eff. April 1, 2011.*

subsections.text: A county is eligible to create a district as provided by this chapter only if a rail line is located in the county that:
is being or has been abandoned through a bankruptcy court or Surface Transportation Board proceeding; or
carries three million gross tons per mile per year or less.
